third_person.text: What would you do in this situation? Tell me in the comments.
Follow for more stories like this one.
Send this to someone who needs to see it.

first_person.text: I was the devil. She was an angel. Or was it the other way around? You tell me.
So — am I the hero in this story, or the villain? You decide.
Would you have helped me? Be honest.
Would a good person do what I did? Tell me the truth.
Believe me, or don't. I'm telling you what I lived.
